form.formComment: Most recently 8th of 10 at Turffontein Inside on March 19 over 1450m, 3.5 len behind Kambati with 61kg at $9. The race before that won by 1.5 len at Vaal March 5 over 1600m on a soft track defeating Future Gamble with 60kg at $17. Draws a nice alley and rates highly.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Comes off a 52 day let-up. First-up scored a big 3.5 len win at Vaal February 5 over 1600m defeating Millennium Warrior carrying 60kg at $8. Second run from a spell 4th of 14 at Turffontein Inside on February 19 over 2000m, 4 len behind Casus Belli with 58kg at $17. Genuine hope on best form.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously.
